title: 有馬記念の後に・筋肉の奇跡

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! With an explosive sprint, Mejiro Ryan
snatches the win from star racer Oguri Cap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Wh-what... just happened...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: O-oh, yeah! Thank you! But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can barely remember what happened... I was
scared, so I started running like crazy. That's all I
know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I guess my body just kept on moving.
choice_data_list: This is a victory for your muscles, I'd say.
This is a victory for your muscles, I'd say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're right... Even if I lost my senses, my body
still remembered how to move.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe that I beat Oguri. But still, I'm
happy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: O-Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I underestimated you. Never thought you'd make
it so far this year.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Turns out I was wrong. You were impressive out
there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Let's do it again. Next year I'll come back more
prepared.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap bids Mejiro Ryan farewell and walks
away with a flourish.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She's so cool... Now that's a real star
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You don't have a race at the end of next year yet,
right? You're free?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll be free. Uh, you didn't have to come all the
way back to ask or anything...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
This battle against a superstar was great
experience for next year!
choice_data_list: What are you going to do next?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Next up is... the G1 at the beginning of the year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna enter the spring Tenno Sho! I'll use this
experience in a race against McQueen, so please
help me prepare for it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her surprise victory against Oguri Cap,
Mejiro Ryan sets her sights on her next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho—her rematch with Mejiro
McQueen will surely be a battle to remember.
